tests.test_name: Download format extension matches selected format -- MD, shiftdoc-tca-story_sample.md
tests.feature: Story Coverage download — filename and format (mocked)
tests.description: Verifies that downloading coverage results in MD format produces a file with the correct name and extension based on the uploaded story file.

test_coverage.verification_step: Given a coverage result is displayed from an uploaded story file
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Coverage results are available from a file that was uploaded by the user

test_coverage.verification_step: When I click the Download MD button
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user can trigger a download in Markdown format

test_coverage.verification_step: Then the downloaded file is named "shiftdoc-tca-story_sample.md"
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The downloaded file is named after the original uploaded story file with a .md extension

tests.test_name: Download filename falls back to date-time when story is pasted
tests.feature: Story Coverage download — filename and format (mocked)
tests.description: Verifies that when a user pastes story content directly instead of uploading a file, the downloaded results file is automatically named using a date-time stamp.

test_coverage.verification_step: Given a coverage result is displayed
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Coverage results are available from pasted story content, with no uploaded filename to reference

test_coverage.verification_step: When I click the Download MD button
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user triggers a download in Markdown format
The downloaded file is automatically assigned a name containing a date and time stamp when no source filename is available
